India Student Motorsports Digital Championship

July 13 – August 12, 2026  ·  Open to All Engineering Students Across India

Until July 5

The Championship
Four Weekly Themes
1
Week One

The Taboo & The Transformation

Why Student Motorsports? Break the stereotype. Inspire the next generation of Indian engineers.

2
Week Two

The Chaos & The Cohesion

The raw reality of teamwork. Show how your team overcomes pressure, conflict, and late nights.

3
Week Three

Breaking Barriers & Building India

Diversity, women in motorsports, and India's path to becoming a global manufacturing powerhouse.

4
Week Four

The Machine & The Brotherhood

Technical depth + the spirit of motorsports — where teams help rivals cross the finish line.
